raw_consumer_statement: On XX/XX/year>XXXX  I disputed a charge to my citi credit card. On XX/XX/year>XXXX  I was notified that the company sided with the merchant. On XX/XX/year>XXXX  I sent a letter to Citi with additional information and requesting they review their decision as I have never received any goods or services for the charge and the company simply submitted my agreement to pay for goods as proof that I was responsible. I have not received an update from Citi when I call I am unable to get any answers and am told to send a letter instead.
